title: US national reference lab — Quest/LabCorp scale stress test
description: US national reference lab at Quest/LabCorp tier (~4.5M slides/yr, 180 pathologist FTE, 45 scanners @ $195k). Stress test for large-scale inputs: capex > $10M, 2000-trial Monte Carlo on a large ledger, sensitivity analysis at extreme values. Watching for runtime degradation and large-number formatting.

comparative.dpa_coverage: missing — DPA not designed for reference-lab scale
